_meta.method: ChatGPT was given the CHATGPT_VERIFICATION_CHECKLIST.json, then progressively loaded with experiment scripts, journals, proofs, and documents. Three rounds of assessment followed by a strategic rewrite of the fixed-point proof paper.
_meta.purpose: Independent scientific review of HUF/EITT by a different AI platform. This is the system working as designed: cross-platform verification from the repo.

overall_verdict.one_sentence: A serious exploratory research programme with a strong AI-onboarding structure, a promising compositional diagnostics framework with one genuinely strong worked example (QGP), an instrument paper in the making that is stronger than its current theorem language.
overall_verdict.repo_architecture: UNUSUALLY STRONG — one of the best structural features of the project

tier_1_genuinely_strong.description: Results that are mathematically sound and empirically credible. Ready for external review.

items.assessment: The exact chain-rule identity d(sigma2_A)/dt = (2/D) sum(clr_i * clr_i') is real mathematics, not a metaphor. This is the best scientific spine in the project.
Published STAR BES / ALICE yields, compositional stress minimum, baryon/meson decomposition, genuinely meaningful stationary-point interpretation. The flagship case.

items.item: Geometric-mean decimation as natural simplex operator
items.assessment: Under ILR transform, geometric means become arithmetic means. This makes geometric block decimation the correct operator for averaging compositions in Aitchison geometry.
items.status: STRONG — follows from standard CoDa theory

items.assessment: 0.18% entropy variation under geometric vs 14-41% under arithmetic. Measurable consequence of the wrong averaging operation. The 40-year gap filled.
The mathematical substrate is real and well-established (Aitchison 1986, Pawlowsky-Glahn 2015).

Gives the framework a native signal-processing home. LF rolloff as compositional walk, passband as compositionally dead, slope as diagnostic. The stored-energy attack shows the integrity layer matters.
items.status: STRONG — materially improves the instrument story

items.assessment: Commendably explicit about the three misses. Two have plausible internal fixes. Right scientific posture.

items.item: Boundary diagnostic (monotonic trajectories as diagnostic, not failure)
items.assessment: Reframing 'no lock' as 'the system is monotonic and the slope is the finding' is a smart scientific move. Cosmic-ray and demographic panels are persuasive as descriptive diagnostics.

tier_2_promising_not_proved.description: Results that are interesting, plausible, and worth pursuing, but not yet at the evidential level needed for strong claims.

items.assessment: The QGP case is legitimate. But claiming many ordered compositional systems have an interpretable vertex needs much more testing. The neutron-star side is model-based (SLy4 approximation), not direct observational.
The lock-range / error-slope / contamination-alarm interpretation is useful. But 'PLL equivalence' is not proved. Should be presented as engineering interpretation, not theorem.
items.status: PROMISING — forward hypothesis, not proved equivalence

items.assessment: Most naturally convincing domains. Competing channels are physically meaningful, plots support the idea. Framework looks like a promising diagnostic language for boundary finding.
Progressive contamination exhibits rise-peak-decay envelope in tested attacks. Interesting engineering motif but still only proposition/proof-sketch, not derivation.
Useful secondary integrity signal. Catches cases where primary metric is too permissive. But not a universal contamination detector — false-positive/negative guarantees not established.
items.status: PROMISING — useful instrument, not universal detector

tier_3_exploratory_atlas.description: Interesting exploratory work that generates hypotheses but should not be presented as proof of universality.

items.assessment: The sweep is useful as a concept map but not as proof of universality. Lock criteria are permissive (a>0, R2>0.3, vertex-in-range). Failures recovered by inversion, splitting, reframing creates researcher-degrees-of-freedom problem.
Higher-order polynomials almost always improve in-sample fit. Needs model-selection penalties (AIC/BIC), cross-validation, surrogate data, null ensembles. Descriptive, not yet discovery.

Residual structure and cross-correlation are real measurable things. But calling them 'contamination', 'force crosstalk', or 'boundary species' needs stronger justification. Residuals can be structured for ordinary reasons.
items.status: EXPLORATORY — interpretive overlay, needs null models

items.assessment: States sigma2_A(T_M(X)) <= sigma2_A(X)/M. But verification chart shows measured ratio staying near 1 while prediction is 1/M. Statement/implementation/plot mismatch. Must be resolved.
Useful qualitatively but predicted/actual ratios range from modest to orders of magnitude off. Should be described as empirical lock-range marker, not theorem-derived constant.

discipline_framing._note: The most important strategic outcome of this review. ChatGPT proposed, Peter approved.
discipline_framing.definition: The study of how ordered compositions behave under lawful aggregation, coarse-graining, and contamination on the simplex. Its aim is to determine whether a system is being forced through a smooth constrained manifold, how strongly that constraint holds, where it breaks, and whether the observed structure is genuine or corrupted.

hierarchy.method_family: Geometric-mean decimation, geometric-arithmetic separation, slope analysis, lock-range analysis, contamination checks
hierarchy.protocol: HIVP/HIVIP, blind tests, adversarial tests, minimum-blocks guard, integrity checks

discipline_framing.key_sentence: EITT is not the theory itself. It is the first instrument in a broader discipline of compositional constraint diagnostics.
discipline_framing.pll_position: PLL/Rayleigh language is currently the leading engineering interpretation of the instrument's observed behavior, not yet its final proof-theoretic foundation.

bell_test_normalization.issue: Checklist states (2.2018-2.0)/2.0 = 10.09%, but FAST_REFRESH reports 12.31%. Normalization basis not standardized.
bell_test_normalization.action: Fix to consistent normalization. Document which basis is used.

integrity_manifest_lag.issue: FAST_REFRESH shows updated 2026-04-19, integrity manifest shows 2026-04-18. Manifest may be one step behind.
integrity_manifest_lag.action: Verify manifest is current or update.

variance_contraction_theorem.issue: Theorem 3 statement and verification plot do not match. Measured ratio near 1, prediction 1/M.
variance_contraction_theorem.action: Downgrade to qualitative statement or fix the theorem.

m_break_language.issue: Presented as theorem-derived in some places, but blind test shows predicted/actual ratios off by orders of magnitude.
m_break_language.action: Reframe as empirical lock-range marker throughout.

universality_language.issue: '30/30 wins', 'universal lock', 'every two-force system' — too aggressive for exploratory atlas.
universality_language.action: Replace with 'exploratory atlas across 30 domains' or 'hypothesis map'.

strong_claims: Geometric-mean block aggregation is the natural simplex-respecting decimation rule (equivalent to averaging in ILR space)
Under stationarity, geometric decimation preserves the Aitchison location parameter up to boundary effects
Arithmetic and geometric decimation separate for nondegenerate compositional processes
Relative EITT, geometric-arithmetic separation, slope, and empirical M_break together form a useful diagnostic toolkit
Shannon entropy variation under geometric decimation: 0.18% at 341:1 compression
Arithmetic mean destroys 14-41% of entropy structure on the same data
The Vertex Theorem is an exact chain-rule identity
moderate_claims: The toolkit performs nontrivially in blind classification and contamination experiments (17/20, 90% sensitivity)
The same instrument vocabulary appears meaningful across several empirical domains
The QGP freeze-out is a credible flagship worked example
EXP-04 microphone valley provides a native signal-processing validation
hypothesis_only_claims: EITT behaves like a compositional PLL (engineering interpretation)
Progressive contamination follows a Rayleigh-type envelope
A unified coherence-budget interpretation may exist across domains
The 93% universal entropy bound is an empirical pattern
M_break admits reliable prediction rather than qualitative ordering only

recommended_publication_posture.paper_1: Narrow foundations paper — conservative mathematical core (geometric-mean decimation, ILR averaging, Aitchison preservation, geometric-arithmetic separation)
recommended_publication_posture.paper_2: Instrument / diagnostics paper — EITT as compositional diagnostic, blind test, contamination detection, EXP-04 validation
recommended_publication_posture.paper_3: Forward hypothesis paper — PLL/Rayleigh as engineering interpretation, cross-domain atlas, discipline framing
recommended_publication_posture.codawork_2026: Lead with geometric mean proof (gift to CoDa community), QGP vertex theorem second (strongest science), domain validation as evidence, discipline framing as close

chatgpt_revised_paper.title: EITT Fixed-Point Framework: Toward a Discipline of Compositional Constraint Diagnostics
chatgpt_revised_paper.subtitle: A Conservative Mathematical Core for Geometric-Mean Decimation on the Simplex
chatgpt_revised_paper.status: ChatGPT drafted a full conservative rewrite. Available from Peter. Key features: only claims what proofs support, moves Rayleigh/PLL to forward hypothesis section, introduces CCD discipline framing.
chatgpt_revised_paper.location: Peter has the full text from ChatGPT canvas. Should be saved to repo when reviewed.
